name: Suspicious WMIC XSL Script Execution
description: Detection of WMIC.exe executing with an XSL stylesheet that loads scripting DLLs, a common technique for application whitelisting bypass and defense evasion leading to code execution.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when WMIC.exe executed or the DLL was loaded.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The process image (e.g., wmic.exe) that initiated the activity or loaded the DLL.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line of the process, including the XSL format argument.

parameters.name: LoadedImage
parameters.description: The scripting DLL (jscript.dll or vbscript.dll) loaded by the process.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the activity occurred.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
